name: Solve or Suffer
description: Think fast or face the consequences! Solve or Suffer puts you in the hot seat of the worlds strictest math classroom. Your teacher is watching. The timer is ticking. One wrong answer and the chalk comes flying — give three wrong answers and youre FAILED! SOLVE fast math equations Race against the timer Keep the strict teacher happy Wrong answers = punishment! Build combos for massive scores Beat your high score every round Starting with simple addition, the difficulty ramps up through subtraction, multiplication and division. Can you make it through all 50+ levels without getting slapped?
instructions: Mouse Click on correct number of the equation Keyboard Select correct numbers with arrow keys Mobile Tap on correct number of the equation
